The following events took place in approximately '''25,200 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Rakata/Legends|Rakatan]] [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] collapses.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref><ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The [[Hutt Empire]], is established by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], filling in the power vacuum of the Rakatan Infinite Empire's demise.

==Births==
*[[Xer VIII]] on [[Argai]]<ref name="Xim Week">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-the-history-of-xim-and-the-tion-cluster|text=Essential Atlas Extra: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster|int=Xim Week: The History of Xim and the Tion Cluster}}</ref>
